no-rname.msg: A client just requested one of your widgets without specifying the widget name. Check your browser sources, make sure each URL matches the widget you are requesting.

bad-rname.msg: A client just requested a widget that does not exist. Check your browser sources, make sure each URL matches the widget you are requesting.

failed-rules.msg: A widget request resulted in the failed load of your custom style rules. Check to make sure /user_data/styles.json is not opened in a different window. If it's not, reload the application. [ERRNO#1204]

failed-strdat.msg: The application failed to load external data for a requested widget. Try again in a few minutes, make sure you don't have any modules or the module map open in a different window. [ERRNO#1201]

ext-net.msg: A network system just attempted access to this application's API. To enable remote systems, active the 'Serve Remote' option.

app-loaded.msg: Application successfully loaded. Ready to serve.
